name: Fruit-Nut Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the peanuts and place them in a large bowl.
2. Add the raisins to the bowl with the peanuts.
3. Chop the dates into small pieces and add them to the bowl as well.
4. Mix all ingredients together until evenly combined.
5. Serve the mixture in small bowls. This recipe makes approximately 3 cups. Each tablespoon contains about 35 calories.
